recommendations: CRITICAL: Add test IDs (e.g., 0.4-UNIT-001) to ALL tests for traceability
CRITICAL: Add priority markers (P0/P1/P2/P3) to ALL tests
Extract duplicate mock setup into helper functions or fixtures
Use BDD format: 'should [result] when [context]' in test names
Add comments explaining complex test scenarios
Optimize slow tests (15s timeout indicates performance issue)
summary: Tests have significant maintainability issues - 10 violations (2 HIGH). Missing test IDs and priority markers across all tests.
